message:
test(conformance): add locale_ops fixture test

Add fixture-based conformance test for locale operations (20 cases)
covering setlocale, localeconv, nl_langinfo, newlocale, uselocale,
duplocale, freelocale, and nl_langinfo_l functions.

Test count: 96 → 97 passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
